# Contributing to HELIOS CODEX

Thank you for your interest in contributing to the world's first God-tier sovereign stablecoin protocol.

## Development Process

1. Fork the relevant repository
2. Create a feature branch (`git checkout -b feat/your-feature`)
3. Commit changes (`git commit -m 'feat: add feature'`)
4. Push to branch (`git push origin feat/your-feature`)
5. Open a Pull Request

## Commit Convention

We follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/):

- `feat:` new feature
- `fix:` bug fix
- `docs:` documentation
- `security:` security patch
- `perf:` performance improvement
- `refactor:` code refactoring
- `test:` adding tests
- `chore:` maintenance

## Security

For security vulnerabilities, please email security@galactic-union.org — do NOT open a public issue.

## Code of Conduct

This project adheres to the GALACTIC-UNION Code of Conduct. By participating, you agree to uphold this standard.
